overview: This fish appears to be a Common Bream (Abramis brama), characterized by its deep, laterally compressed body and silvery-bronze scales. It is a freshwater species commonly found in still or slow-moving waters like lakes and rivers throughout Europe. Common bream are often covered in a slimy coating and can grow to be quite large, sometimes reaching significant weights.
